steps.title: Spot what the second sentence does
steps.content: The second sentence reveals the specific form of the tribute mentioned in the first sentence—a concrete detail that makes the general claim precise. The transition must signal this movement from general to specific.

steps.title: Match the transition to this movement
steps.content: Specifically directly introduces a precise detail. Regardless and Instead both signal contrast, while Last of all implies sequential listing. That matches choice D — D is correct.
